nodes.label: Stacked Denoising Autoencoders for WiFi Fingerprint Localization
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. WiDeep: WiFi-based Accurate and Robust Indoor Localization System using Deep Learning : 201.pdf
nodes.rationale: Stacked denoising autoencoders combined with a probabilistic fusion framework learn noise-robust latent representations of WiFi fingerprints, outperforming conventional approaches on heterogeneous devices.
